# Psychedelica.nl

> Honest, no-nonsense knowledge about psychedelics for the Dutch public. Science, harm reduction, and clear answers in NL and EN.

## Dutch articles

- [Hoe word je ayahuasca begeleider?](https://psychedelica.nl/nl/articles/hoe-word-je-ayahuasca-begeleider/): A guide with 21 not-so-simple steps to getting started as a plant ceremony facilitator
- [7 misvattingen over ayahuasca ontkracht](https://psychedelica.nl/nl/articles/misvattingen-over-ayahuasca/): The truth behind the most widespread misunderstandings about ayahuasca

## English articles

- [How to become an ayahuasca facilitator?](https://psychedelica.nl/en/articles/hoe-word-je-ayahuasca-begeleider/): A guide with 21 not-so-simple steps to getting started as a plant ceremony facilitator
- [7 common misconceptions about ayahuasca debunked](https://psychedelica.nl/en/articles/misvattingen-over-ayahuasca/): The truth behind the most widespread misunderstandings about ayahuasca
